## Proposed change

<!-- Describe the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Dependency upgrade
- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix/feature causing existing functionality to break)
- [ ] Code quality / refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is tested and works locally on Home Assistant
- [ ] Tests have been added/updated where applicable
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] hassfest and HACS validation pass
- [ ] `strings.json` and the relevant `translations/*.json` are updated if needed
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
